summary: This document details research findings on UK GP practice challenges, highlighting reduced capacity, administrative burdens, and the high volume of visits from seniors with Long Term Health Conditions. It proposes remote voice-based check-ups as a solution to free up GP capacity and addresses workforce burnout and outdated IT infrastructure. The notes serve as foundational problem discovery material for the startup's value proposition.
